method: Matched deterministic source-mutation replay. One operation is one bounded authoring mutation; validate, build, and playtest are equal proof commands and are not counted as authoring mutations. A failed command is any mutation or proof command with a non-zero exit. Baseline operations replay the explicit source shape; migrated operations replay the registry-owned declaration producing the same normalized entities/effects.

cases.prompt: Author eight stable orb instances with the recorded transforms and prove all generated IDs are visible.
Author detect, once-per-target gate, reward, despawn, event, and completion behavior for orb collection and prove web/native state parity.

baseline.mutation: five independently authored pipeline stages in script: detect, gate, reward, consume/event, completion

limitations: This deterministic replay measures bounded authoring mutations, not LLM tokens. It makes no claim about unrelated session-cost prompts. Proof command sets are identical within each matched case.
